source_note: 基于现有 SM-BT 黑色圣堂规则包生成的完整中文版本。包含黑色圣堂专属分遣队与兼容的通用星际战士分遣队，单位范围与原包保持一致。文本翻译参考公开网络资料与常见 40K 社区术语，对诸如 致命命中、连击、毁灭伤害、反X、无敌豁免、深袭、先攻 等关键词做了统一处理。正式规则解释与裁定请以官方出版物为准。

abilities.name: 正义热情
abilities.timing: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an 敌方单位 has shot, if any models in 该单位 were destroyed as a result of those attacks, 该单位 can make a Righteous Zeal move
abilities.summary: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an 敌方单位 has shot, if any models in 该单位 were destroyed as a result of those attacks, 该单位 can make a Righteous Zeal move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the result: models in 该单位 move a number of inches up to this result, but 该单位 must end that move as close as possible to the closest 敌方单位 (excluding 飞行器 ). When doing so, those models can be moved 位于以下目标的接战范围内：that 敌方单位. This unit cannot make a Righteous Zeal move while it is 战斗冲击ed or 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s, and can only make one Righteous Zeal move per phase.

abilities.summary: 在你的指挥阶段，you can select one friendly 阿斯塔特修会 载具 model within 3" of 该模型. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds and, until the start of your next Command phase, each time that 载具 model makes an attack, add 1 to the 命中掷骰. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

abilities.name: Omnissiah的复仇
abilities.timing: If a friendly 阿斯塔特修会 载具 model is destroyed within 12" of 该模型, until the end of the battle, this mo
abilities.summary: If a friendly 阿斯塔特修会 载具 model is destroyed within 12" of 该模型, until the end of the battle, 该模型’s Omnissian power axe has an 攻击次数属性 of 7.

abilities.name: 传送荷马
abilities.timing: 在对手的部署区域
abilities.summary: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for 该单位 anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target 该单位 with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set 该单位 up within 3" of that token and not within 9" of any 敌方模型s. That token is then removed.

abilities.name: 弱者审判
abilities.timing: 受到战斗冲击，从每个测试中减去1
abilities.summary: Each time an 敌方单位 (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES ) 位于以下目标的接战范围内：该单位 Falls Back, all models in that 敌方单位 must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that 敌方单位 is 战斗冲击ed, subtract 1 from each of those tests.

abilities.name: 突击坡道
abilities.timing: Each time a unit disembarks from 该模型 after it has made a 普通移动, that unit is still eligible to declare a ch
abilities.summary: Each time a unit disembarks from 该模型 after it has made a 普通移动, that unit is still eligible to 声明冲锋 this turn.
abilities.source: 太空海军陆战队（战锤传奇）

abilities.name: 白蚁攻击
abilities.timing: 移动阶段，不考虑任何任务规则
abilities.summary: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within 该模型 can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all 敌方模型s.
abilities.source: 太空海军陆战队（战锤传奇）

abilities.name: 震颤贝壳
abilities.timing: 在你的射击阶段，after 该单位 has shot, if an enemy 步兵 unit was hit by one or more attacks made by 该单位’s thunderfire cannon this phase, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that 敌方单位 is shaken
abilities.summary: 在你的射击阶段，after 该单位 has shot, if an enemy 步兵 unit was hit by one or more attacks made by 该单位’s thunderfire cannon this phase, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that 敌方单位 is shaken. While a unit is shaken, subtract 2 from that unit’s 移动属性, and subtract 2 from Advance and 冲锋掷骰 made for that unit.
abilities.source: 太空海军陆战队（战锤传奇）

abilities.name: 乘员炮兵
abilities.timing: 如果本单元中的一个模型被销毁，则本单元中的剩余模型也会被销毁。
abilities.summary: 如果本单元中的一个模型被销毁，则本单元中的剩余模型也会被销毁。

abilities.summary: Each time 该模型 makes an attack that targets a 载具, improve the Strength and 伤害属性 of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a 防御工事 unit, improve the Strength and 伤害属性s of that attack by 2 instead).
abilities.source: 太空海军陆战队（战锤传奇）

abilities.summary: 持有人有4 +无懈可击的保存。

abilities.summary: 该单位每次结束一次冲锋移动时，until the end of the turn, 近战武器 equipped by models in 该单位 have the [致命命中] ability.

abilities.name: 攻城盾牌
abilities.timing: When making 远程攻击s with its demolisher cannon, 该模型 can target 敌方单位s 位于以下目标的接战范围内：it (
abilities.summary: When making 远程攻击s with its demolisher cannon, 该模型 can target 敌方单位s 位于以下目标的接战范围内：it (provided no other friendly units are also 位于以下目标的接战范围内：that 敌方单位). In addition, when making 远程攻击s, 该模型 does not suffer the penalty to its 命中掷骰s for being 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s.

abilities.summary: 每次该模型对怪物或载具单位进行远程攻击时，重新滚动1次伤害。

abilities.summary: 在你的射击阶段，after 该模型 has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Whirlwind vengeance launcher scored a hit against an enemy 步兵 unit, that unit must take a 战斗冲击 test.

abilities.summary: 在你的射击阶段，after 该模型 has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy 步兵 unit, that unit must take a 战斗冲击 test.

stratagems.name: GO TO GROUND
stratagems.timing: 敌方单位选择目标后，你的对手的射击阶段。
stratagems.target: 您军队中的一个步兵单位被选为攻击单位的一个或多个攻击目标。
stratagems.effect: 在阶段结束之前，您单位中的所有型号都有6 +无懈可击的保存，并享有保障福利。

stratagems.name: 命令重新滚动
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after you make an Advance 掷骰, a Charge roll, a Desperate Escape test or a 凶险 test for a unit from 你的军队, or a 命中掷骰, a 致伤掷骰, a 伤害掷骰 or a saving throw for a model in that unit, or a roll to determine the number of attacks made with a weapon equipped by a model in that unit. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.
stratagems.target: 你的军队中的那个单位或模型。
stratagems.effect: You re-roll that roll, test or saving throw. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those rolls or saving throws to re-roll.

stratagems.name: 史诗级挑战
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, when a 角色 unit from 你的军队 that is 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more Attached units is 被选中进行近战.
stratagems.target: 您单位中的一个角色模型。
stratagems.effect: 在该阶段结束之前，该模型进行的所有近战攻击都具有[精度]能力。

stratagems.name: 疯狂勇敢
stratagems.timing: 指挥阶段的战斗冲击步骤，就在你对军队中的一个单位进行战斗冲击测试之前。
stratagems.target: 你军队的那个单位。
stratagems.effect: 你的单位会自动通过战斗冲击测试。

stratagems.name: 英雄干预
stratagems.timing: 敌方单位结束充能移动后立即进入对手的充能阶段。
stratagems.target: One unit from 你的军队 that is within 6" of that 敌方单位 and would be eligible to 声明冲锋 against that 敌方单位 if it were your Charge phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit now 声明冲锋 that targets only that 敌方单位, and you resolve that charge as if it were your Charge phase.

stratagems.name: 守望先锋之火
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement or Charge phase, just after an 敌方单位 is set up or when an 敌方单位 starts or ends a Normal, Advance or Fallback move, or 声明冲锋.
stratagems.target: One unit from 你的军队 that is within 24" of that 敌方单位 and that would be eligible to shoot if it were your Shooting phase.
stratagems.effect: 如果该敌方单位对你的单位可见，你的单位可以像射击阶段一样射击该敌方单位。

stratagems.name: 快速入口
stratagems.timing: 对手的移动阶段结束。
stratagems.target: 你的军队中有一个单位在预备役中。
stratagems.effect: Your unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, and if every model in that unit has the 深袭 ability, you can set that unit up as described in the 深袭 ability (even though it is not your Movement phase).

stratagems.name: 反击攻势
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段，就在敌方单位战斗之后。
stratagems.target: One unit from 你的军队 that is 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s and that has not already been 被选中进行近战 this phase.
stratagems.effect: 你的单位接下来战斗。

stratagems.name: 坦克冲击
stratagems.timing: 你的冲锋阶段，就在你军队的载具单位结束冲锋移动之后。
stratagems.target: 那辆车。
stratagems.effect: Select one 敌方单位 位于以下目标的接战范围内：你的单位, and select one 载具 model in 你的单位 that is 位于以下目标的接战范围内：that 敌方单位. Roll a number of D6 equal to the 韧性属性 of the selected 载具 model. For each 5+, that 敌方单位 suffers 1 致命伤 (to a maximum of 6 致命伤).

stratagems.name: 烟幕弹
stratagems.timing: 敌方单位选择目标后，你的对手的射击阶段。
stratagems.target: 你的军队中的一个烟雾单位被选中作为攻击单位的一个或多个攻击的目标。
stratagems.effect: 在阶段结束前，你单位的所有模型都具有掩护效益和隐身能力。

stratagems.name: 手雷
stratagems.timing: <g id="1">时间： </g>您的拍摄阶段。
stratagems.target: One 手雷 unit from 你的军队 (excluding units that Advance, Fallback or have shot this turn) that is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s.
stratagems.effect: Select one 手雷 model in 你的单位 and one 敌方单位 that is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：any units from 你的军队 and is within 8" of and visible to your 手雷 model. Roll six D6: for each 4+, that 敌方单位 suffers 1 致命伤.

stratagems.name: 蔑视的盔甲
stratagems.timing: 在对手的射击阶段或近战阶段，敌方单位刚刚选择其目标后。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 that was 被选为目标 of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets 你的单位, worsen the 护甲穿透属性 of that attack by 1.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战术策略

stratagems.name: 没有太大的威胁
stratagems.timing: <g id="1">时间： </g>您的拍摄阶段。
stratagems.target: 来自您的军队的一个阿斯塔特修会单位尚未被选中拍摄此阶段。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a 远程攻击 以怪兽或载具单位为目标, you can re-roll the 致伤掷骰.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战术策略

stratagems.name: 战斗演习召回
stratagems.timing: <g id="1">时间： </g>您的拍摄阶段。
stratagems.target: 来自您的军队的一个阿斯塔特修会单位尚未被选中拍摄此阶段。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，远程武器 equipped by models in 你的单位 have the [连击 1] ability. If 你的单位 保持静止 this turn, then until the end of the phase, each time a model in 你的单位 makes a 远程攻击, a successful unmodified 命中掷骰 of 5+ scores a 暴击.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战术策略

stratagems.name: 没有一个后退的步骤
stratagems.timing: <g id="1">时间： </g>您的命令阶段。
stratagems.target: 一个阿斯塔特修会步兵单位，来自你的军队，在目标标记的范围内。
stratagems.effect: 直到本回合结束，double the 目标控制（OC）属性 of models in 你的单位, but it must Remain Stationary this turn.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 复仇冰雹
stratagems.timing: 你的对手的射击阶段，就在敌方单位解决其攻击后。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 that had one or more of its models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that 敌方单位 when doing so, and can only do so if that 敌方单位 is an eligible target.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 严格的纪律
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段结束。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from your army that is within 接战范围 of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: 您的单位可以立即进行最多6英寸的后退。
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队
tags: 铁砧围攻部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 法典纪律
stratagems.timing: 你的射击阶段或战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes an attack that targets an 敌方单位, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1. If that target is auspex scanned, re-roll a 致伤掷骰 of 1 as well.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队
tags: 堡垒特遣部队–战斗战术策略

stratagems.name: 复仇之光
stratagems.timing: 你的射击阶段或战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Select the [致命命中] or [连击 1] ability. 直到本阶段结束，weapons equipped by models in 你的单位 have that ability while targeting an auspex scanned unit or if 持有者 has the 战线 keyword.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队
tags: 堡垒特遣部队–战斗战术策略

stratagems.name: 异端已撤销
stratagems.timing: 您的拍摄阶段或充电阶段。
stratagems.target: 你的军队中有一个阿斯塔特修会单位（不包括战线单位）。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，你的单位 is eligible to shoot and 声明冲锋 in a turn in which it Advance or Fallback. If it does, every target of that charge and every target of those attacks must be an auspex scanned unit.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队
tags: 堡垒特遣部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 引导式中断
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an 阿斯塔特修会 战线 unit from 你的军队 has finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: 阿斯塔特修会 BATTLELINE单元。
stratagems.effect: When an 敌方单位 is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, if that 敌方单位 does not have the 怪兽 or 载具 keywords, until the start of your next turn, it is pinned. While a unit is pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s 移动属性 and subtract 2 from 冲锋掷骰 made for that unit.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队
tags: 堡垒特遣部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 冲击轰击
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an 阿斯塔特修会 战线 unit from 你的军队 finished making its attacks.
stratagems.target: 阿斯塔特修会 BATTLELINE单元。
stratagems.effect: When an 敌方单位 is auspex scanned as a result of those attacks this turn, until the start of your next turn, it is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the 命中掷骰.
stratagems.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队
tags: 堡垒特遣部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 虔诚的敌意
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: 你的军队中一个尚未被选中参与本阶段战斗的牧师或司法单位。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a 近战攻击 that targets an 敌方单位, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1. If that target is a 怪兽 or 载具 unit, re-roll a 致伤掷骰 of 1 as well.

stratagems.name: 虔诚推送
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 步兵 unit from 你的军队 that has not been 被选中进行近战 this phase.
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

stratagems.name: 为了皇帝的荣耀！
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 步兵 unit from 你的军队 that has not been 被选中进行近战 this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [精准] ability.

stratagems.name: 内心坚韧不拔
stratagems.timing: 战斗阶段，就在你军队的阿德普图斯·阿斯塔特斯步兵单位整合之前。
stratagems.target: 那个阿斯塔特修会步兵部队。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a Consolidation move, it does not need to end that move closer to the closest 敌方模型 (or the closest 敌方单位 if the Suffer Not the Unclean to Live Vow is active for it).

stratagems.name: 恐怖十字军
stratagems.timing: 敌方单位宣布冲锋后立即进入对手的冲锋阶段。
stratagems.target: 你的军队中的一个阿德普图斯·阿斯塔特斯步兵单位被选为该冲锋的目标之一。
stratagems.effect: 该敌方单位必须进行战斗冲击测试，从结果中减去1。

stratagems.name: 异端会招致报复
stratagems.timing: 在对手的移动阶段，敌方单位刚完成一次普通移动、Advance 或 Fallback 后。
stratagems.target: One Chaplain or Judiciar unit from 你的军队 that is within 9" of that 敌方单位 and is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Retribution move. To do so, roll one D6: models in 你的单位 move a number of inches up to the result, but 你的单位 must end that move as close as possible to the closest 敌方单位 (excluding 飞行器 ). When doing so, those models can be moved 位于以下目标的接战范围内：that 敌方单位.

stratagems.name: 战斗坩埚
stratagems.timing: 你的射击阶段或战斗阶段。
stratagems.target: 一个来自您的军队的阿斯塔特修会步兵单位，尚未被选中在此阶段射击或战斗。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes an attack 以最近的可选目标为目标 within 6", add 1 to the 致伤掷骰.

stratagems.name: 牺牲方案

stratagems.effect: 在该阶段结束前，该单位模特装备的洪流武器具有[毁灭伤害]能力。

stratagems.name: 蔑视的盔甲

stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets 你的单位, worsen the 护甲穿透属性 of that attack by 1.

stratagems.effect: One unit embarked within that 运输 can disembark as if it were your Movement phase, and can then shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that 敌方单位 when doing so, and can only do so if that 敌方单位 is an eligible target.
tags: 烈焰风暴突击部队–战斗策略策略

stratagems.name: 火焰猛攻

stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 that disembarked from a 运输 this turn and has not been 被选中进行射击 this phase.
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a 远程攻击 以最近的可选目标为目标 within 12", add 1 to the 命中掷骰. If one or more 敌方模型s are destroyed as the result of any of those attacks, select one of those destroyed models; that destroyed model’s unit must take a 战斗冲击 test.

stratagems.name: 快速登船

stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 运输 unit from 你的军队 that has no models embarked within it, and one 阿斯塔特修会 步兵 unit from 你的军队 wholly within 6" of that 运输.
stratagems.effect: 您的步兵部队可以在该运输工具内登船。
tags: 烈焰风暴突击部队–战略策略

stratagems.name: 火焰风暴

stratagems.target: 来自您的军队的一个阿斯塔特修会单位尚未被选中拍摄此阶段。
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，远程武器 equipped by models in 你的单位 have the [无视掩体] ability. If 你的单位 is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, until the end of the phase, improve the 护甲穿透属性 of such weapons by 1 as well.
tags: 嘉迪斯特遣部队–战斗战术策略

stratagems.name: 蔑视的盔甲

stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 that was 被选为目标 of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets 你的单位, worsen the 护甲穿透属性 of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: 遵守这一章

tags: 嘉迪斯特遣部队–战斗战术策略

stratagems.name: 只有在死亡时，职责才会结束

stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 that was 被选为目标 of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

stratagems.name: 谴责信息-已筛选

stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time 你的单位 makes a Charge move, models in 你的单位 can move through models (when doing so, its models can move 位于以下目标的接战范围内：敌方模型s, but they can only end that move 位于以下目标的接战范围内：敌方模型s if those 敌方模型s belong to a unit that 你的单位 declared a charge against this turn).

stratagems.name: 神帝帝国的护手

stratagems.name: 毫不妥协的出口

stratagems.name: 无止境的事业

stratagems.effect: If 你的单位 is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s, it can make a 普通移动 of up to 6". It cannot embark within a 运输 at the end of this move if it disembarked from a 运输 this turn.

stratagems.effect: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but must target only that 敌方单位 when doing so, and can only do so if that 敌方单位 is an eligible target.

stratagems.name: 自动感应协调

stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，weapons equipped by models in 你的单位 have the [精准] ability and each time a model in 你的单位 makes an attack that targets a 角色 unit, add 1 to the 命中掷骰.

stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，models in 你的单位s have the 隐蔽 ability and each time a 远程攻击 targets one of 你的单位s, 该单位中的模型 have the 掩体增益 against that attack.

When doing so, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, until the start of your next turn, that 敌方单位 is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the 命中掷骰.

stratagems.effect: 直到本回合结束，you can re-roll 冲锋掷骰 made for 你的单位 and 近战武器 equipped by 该单位中的模型 have the [突刺] ability.

stratagems.target: One 阿斯塔特修会 MOUNTED or 阿斯塔特修会 载具 unit (excluding WALKERS) from your army.

stratagems.name: 阴影一击

stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes a 远程攻击 that targets an 敌方单位 that is more than 12" away, improve the 弹道技术 and 护甲穿透属性s of that attack by 1. stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets 你的单位, worsen the 护甲穿透属性 of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: 游击战术

stratagems.name: 计算的FEINT

stratagems.effect: 你的单位可以进行最多D6英寸的普通移动，如果是PHOBOS或ScouT小队单位，则可以进行最多6英寸的普通移动。

stratagems.name: 致命奖品

stratagems.effect: That objective marker is said to be Sabotaged, and remains under your control even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn. While an objective marker is Sabotaged and under your control, each time an 敌方单位 ends a Normal, Advance, Fallback or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 2+, that 敌方单位 suffers D3 致命伤.

stratagems.effect: 直到本阶段结束，each time a model in 你的单位 makes an attack, if that model’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers or the target unit is within range of one or more objective markers, improve the 护甲穿透属性 of that attack by 1.

detachment_rules.name: 战斗条令
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-嘉迪斯特遣部队
detachment_rules.summary:
在你的指挥阶段开始时，you can select one of the 战斗条令 listed below. 直到你下个指挥阶段开始时，that Combat Doctrine is active and its effects apply to all 阿斯塔特修会 units from 你的军队. You can only select each Combat Doctrine once per battle. Devastator Doctrine
The Codex Astartes details the strategic value of overwhelming firepower applied to key targets while advancing into position to eliminate threats.
This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advance.
Tactical Doctrine
As the warring armies close upon one another and vicious fire-fights erupt, the Codex lays out strategies for swiftly seizing the initiative and combining versatility with firepower.
This unit is eligible to shoot and 声明冲锋 in a turn in which it Fallback.
Assault Doctrine
The Codex Astartes leaves no doubt that the killing blow in most engagements must be delivered with a decisive close-quarters strike. It presents plentiful tactical means to achieve this end.
This unit is eligible to 声明冲锋 in a turn in which it Advance.

detachment_rules.name: 帝国之盾
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-铁砧攻城部队
detachment_rules.summary: Ranged weapons equipped by 阿斯塔特修会 models from 你的军队 have the [重型] ability. 如果该武器已拥有此能力，each time an attack is made with that weapon, 若攻击模型所在单位本回合保持静止，add 1 to the 致伤掷骰.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队

detachment_rules.name: 装甲之怒
detachment_rules.summary: Once per phase for each 阿斯塔特修会 unit in 你的军队, you can re-roll one 命中掷骰, one 致伤掷骰 or one 伤害掷骰 made for a model in that unit.

detachment_rules.name: 近距歼灭
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-烈焰风暴突击部队
detachment_rules.summary: Ranged weapons equipped by 阿斯塔特修会 models from 你的军队 have the [突击] ability, and each time an attack made with such a weapon targets a unit within 12", add 1 to the 力量属性 of that attack.

detachment_rules.name: 闪电突击
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-风暴之矛特遣部队
detachment_rules.summary: 来自您军队的阿斯塔特修会单位有资格在进攻或后退的回合中宣布冲锋。
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia 数据/Storm突刺专责小组

detachment_rules.name: 暗影宗师
detachment_rules.summary: 每次有远程攻击以an 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队, unless the attacking model is within 12", subtract 1 from the 命中掷骰 and the target has the 掩体增益 against that attack.

detachment_rules.name: 狂热连祷
detachment_rules.summary:
在战斗轮开始时，you can select one of the Litanies listed below. If you do, until the end of the battle round, that Litany is active and its effects apply to all 阿斯塔特修会 步兵 and 阿斯塔特修会 骑乘 units from 你的军队.
Chorus of Relentless Hate
Add 2" to the 移动属性 of models in 该单位 and add 1 to Advance 掷骰 made for it.
Rite of Perfervid Wrath
Add 1 to the 力量属性 of 近战武器 equipped by models in 该单位.
CHANT OF DEATHLESS DEVOTION
Models in 该单位 have a 5+ 无敌豁免 against 远程攻击s.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include 阿斯塔特修会 units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 正义狂热
detachment_rules.summary:
You can re-roll Advance and 冲锋掷骰 made for 阿斯塔特修会 units from 你的军队.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any 阿斯塔特修会 units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 净化与神圣化
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-辩护特遣部队
detachment_rules.summary:
- 每次有攻击以an Ancient unit from 你的军队, if that unit is within range of one or more objective markers and the 力量属性 of that attack is greater than the 韧性属性 of that unit, subtract 1 from the 致伤掷骰.
- Each time a Crusader Squad unit from 你的军队 makes a Righteous Zeal move, that unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker instead of as close as possible to the closest 敌方单位.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any 阿斯塔特修会 units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 震慑突击
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-神锤突击部队
detachment_rules.summary:
- Each time an 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 声明冲锋, if it disembarked from a 运输 this turn, after selecting the targets of that charge, select one of those targets; that 敌方单位 must take a 战斗冲击 test.
- Each time a model in an 阿斯塔特修会 unit from 你的军队 makes a 近战攻击, if it disembarked from a 运输 this turn, add 1 to the 命中掷骰.
限制
Your army can include 黑色圣堂 units, but it cannot include any 阿斯塔特修会 units drawn from any other Chapter.

detachment_rules.name: 联锁战术
detachment_rules.timing: 脱离接触规则-堡垒特遣部队
detachment_rules.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 战线 units from 你的军队:
- Are eligible to shoot and 声明冲锋 in a turn in which they Advance or Fallback.
- Are eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which they Advance or Fallback.
Each time an 阿斯塔特修会 战线 unit from 你的军队 is 被选中进行攻击, after resolving those attacks, select one 敌方单位 hit by one or more of those attacks. 直到本回合结束，that 敌方单位 is auspex scanned. Each time an 阿斯塔特修会 model from 你的军队 makes an attack that targets an auspex scanned unit, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队

detachment_rules.name: 快速空降部署
detachment_rules.timing: 分离规则-轨道突击部队
detachment_rules.summary:
在声明战斗编成步骤开始时，select a number of 阿斯塔特修会 units (excluding 巨型 units) from 你的军队 based on the battle size, as shown below. Models in those units have the 深袭 ability.
BATTLE SIZE NUMBER OF UNITS Incursion 2 Strike Force 3 Onslaught 4
Each time an 阿斯塔特修会 model from 你的军队 makes an attack, 如果它于本回合被部署到战场上，re-roll a 致伤掷骰 of 1. If it disembarked from a Drop Pod this turn, re-roll a 命中掷骰 of 1 as well.
detachment_rules.source: Wahapedia 数据/轨道突击部队

enhancements.name: Battle-psalm Precentor
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-神锤突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Each time 持有者’s unit 声明冲锋, if an 敌方单位 takes a 战斗冲击 test as a result of the 震慑突击 Detachment rule, subtract 1 from that 战斗冲击 test.

点数：10

enhancements.name: 智慧预兆
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-风暴之矛特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance 掷骰 made for that unit.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/Storm突刺专责小组

enhancements.name: 章节英雄
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-堡垒特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
仅限阿斯塔特修会型号。 当持票人带领一个单位时，持票人有战斗线关键词。

积分： 20
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队

enhancements.name: 奉献光环
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-辩护特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have a 5+ 无敌豁免.

点数： 25

enhancements.name: 神圣之怒
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-愤怒游行
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. 每场战斗一次，at the start of the Fight phase, 持有者 can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in 持有者’s unit have the 先攻 ability.

点数：30

enhancements.name: 幽灵编织斗篷
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-先锋先锋
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. The bearer has the 隐蔽 and 独行特工 abilities.

点数：15

enhancements.name: 肉体是软弱的。
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-铁风暴先锋
enhancements.summary:
仅限阿斯塔特修会型号。 持有人具有无痛感4 +能力。

积分： 10

enhancements.name: 舰队指挥官
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-铁砧围攻部队
enhancements.summary:
CAPTAIN model only. 每场战斗一次，at the start of your Shooting phase, you can select one point on the battlefield and place a marker on that point. At the start of your next Shooting phase, place another marker on the battlefield within 12" of the centre of the first marker, then draw a straight line between the centre of each of these markers. Roll one D6 for each unit that line passes over or through: on a 3+, that unit suffers D3 致命伤. Both markers are then removed.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队

enhancements.name: 脾气暴躁的诀窍
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-烈焰风暴突击部队
enhancements.summary:
仅限阿斯塔特修会步兵模型。 携带者近战武器的力量特性增加3点。

积分： 25

enhancements.name: Oathbound Exemplar
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-猛烈战友
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 步兵 model only. Add 1 to Advance 掷骰 made for 持有者’s unit. If the mission pack you are playing features Actions, 持有者’s unit is eligible to start to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advance.

点数：15

enhancements.name: 塔拉蒙的香炉
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-愤怒游行
enhancements.summary:
黑色圣堂 model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each 敌方单位 位于以下目标的接战范围内：持有者’s unit must take a 战斗冲击 test. When doing so, subtract 1 from the result.

点数：15

enhancements.name: 轨道上行链路遗物库
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-轨道突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three 阿斯塔特修会 units from 你的军队 and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

点数：25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/轨道突击部队

enhancements.name: Feinting提款
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-风暴之矛特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, that unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fallback.

点数：10
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/Storm突刺专责小组

enhancements.name: 勇气之刃
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-堡垒特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Improve the 护甲穿透属性 of 近战武器 equipped by 持有者 and 战线 models in 持有者’s unit by 1.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队

enhancements.name: 执行和重新部署
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-先锋先锋
enhancements.summary:
PHOBOS model only. 在你的射击阶段，after 持有者’s unit has shot, if that unit is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s, it can make a 普通移动 of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to 声明冲锋. This cannot allow 持有者’s unit to move more than once in your Shooting phase.

点数：20

enhancements.name: 皇帝之盾魔球
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-辩护特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Models in 持有者’s unit have the 深袭 ability.

点数：10

enhancements.name: 斯多葛防御者
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-铁砧围攻部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, 该单位中的模型 have the 无视伤害 6+ ability while they are 位于一个目标标记范围内 you control and, while that unit is 战斗冲击ed, halve the 目标控制（OC）属性 of 该单位中的模型 instead of changing it to 0.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队

enhancements.name: Augury伺服主机
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-神锤突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one 敌方单位 within 12" of and visible to 持有者. 直到本阶段结束，该单位中的模型 cannot have the 掩体增益.

点数：15

enhancements.name: 在战斗中锻造
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-烈焰风暴突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, once per turn, after making a 命中掷骰 or a saving throw for a model in that unit, you can change the result of that roll to an unmodified 6.

点数：15

enhancements.name: Omnissiah的擅长者
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-铁风暴先锋
enhancements.summary:
TECHMARINE model only. 每个战斗轮次一次，when a saving throw is failed for a friendly 阿斯塔特修会 载具 model within 6" of 持有者, you can change the 伤害属性 of that attack to 0.

点数：35

enhancements.name: <g id="1">擅长法典</g>
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-嘉迪斯特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
CAPTAIN model only. 在你的指挥阶段开始时，if 持有者 is on the battlefield, instead of selecting a Combat Doctrine to be active for 你的军队, you can select the Tactical Doctrine. If you do, until the start of your next Command phase, that Combat Doctrine is active for 持有者’s unit only, even if you have already selected that Combat Doctrine to be active for 你的军队 this battle.

点数：20

enhancements.name: 无情的谴责
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-猛烈战友
enhancements.summary:
Chaplain or Judiciar model only. Each time a model in 持有者’s unit makes a 近战攻击, you can re-roll the 命中掷骰.

点数：25

enhancements.name: 专用枪舰
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-轨道突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 TERMINATOR model only. 每场战斗一次，at the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if 持有者’s unit is not 位于以下目标的接战范围内：one or more 敌方单位s, 持有者 can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove 持有者’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/轨道突击部队

enhancements.name: 战争建筑师
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-铁砧围攻部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, 远程武器 equipped by 该单位中的模型 have the [无视掩体] ability.

点数：25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/铁砧攻城部队

enhancements.name: 机械战争大师
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-铁风暴先锋
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. 在你的指挥阶段，select one 阿斯塔特修会 载具 model within 6" of 持有者. 直到你下个指挥阶段开始时，that 载具 is eligible to shoot even if it Fallback or Advance this turn.

点数：20

enhancements.name: 金刚斗篷
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-烈焰风暴突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Each time an attack is allocated to 持有者, subtract 1 from the 伤害属性 of that attack. If that attack was made with a 熔融 or 洪流 weapon, change the 伤害属性 of that attack to 1 instead.

点数：20

enhancements.name: 狂热先锋
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-猛烈战友
enhancements.summary:
仅限阿斯塔特修会型号。 持票人单位中的模特具有6英寸侦察兵能力。

积分： 20

enhancements.name: 猎人的本能
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-风暴之矛特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 MOUNTED model only. If 持有者’s unit is in Strategic Reserves, for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

点数：25
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/Storm突刺专责小组

enhancements.name: 影子战争老兵
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-先锋先锋
enhancements.summary:
PHOBOS model only. Gain following ability:
Lord of Deceit (Aura): Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of 该模型, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

点数：30

enhancements.name: 狂怒祝福
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-愤怒游行
enhancements.summary:
Chaplain model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [毁灭伤害] ability.

点数： 10

enhancements.name: 圣杀使者
enhancements.timing: 军队名册-神锤突击部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. In the Declare Battle Formations step, if 持有者 starts the battle embarked within a Dedicated 运输, that DEDICATED 运输 has the 侦察 9" ability.

点数：15

enhancements.name: 名誉典狱长
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-辩护特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
Crusade Ancient model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, each time you roll one D6 for 持有者’s Vengeful Exhortation ability, add 1 to the result.

点数：20

enhancements.name: Bombast Omnivox
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-堡垒特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. Each time you select 持有者’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if 持有者’s unit has the 战线 keyword: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

点数：15
enhancements.source: Wahapedia 数据/堡垒特遣部队

enhancements.name: 火系
enhancements.timing: 陆军名册-嘉迪斯特遣部队
enhancements.summary:
阿斯塔特修会 model only. While 持有者 is leading a unit, 远程武器 equipped by 该单位中的模型 have the [连击 1] ability. In addition, while 持有者’s unit is under the effects of the Devastator Doctrine, you can reroll Advance 掷骰 made for that unit.

点数：25
